title: My Teacher Thinks Mosque Visits Are 100% Safe?! 😭 #muslim #shorts (Part 1)
topic:
Reddit post from r/teenagers:

My Islamiat teacher is fricking insane. BEING RELIGIOUS ≠ SAFE FROM CORONAVIRUS

THAT WAS A FAKE POST ON WHATSAPP. THAT'S UTTER BULLSHIT. Just because everything else is open and people are being careless and going out DOES NOT JUSTIFY GOING TO THE MOSQUE FOR PRAYERS. TWO WRONGS DON'T MAKE A RIGHT. The painfully culturally unaware teacher's pet chimed and said, I KID YOU NOT: "There have been no new cases reported from people going out to the Mosque." These dimwits can't tell if a post is fake or not. The TEACHER, who is supposed to guide us and give us advice, had the AUDACITY to say that WHO recently announced that if you don't have symptoms, you don't even need to follow social distancing. I just can't even. Goodbye.
summary: My teacher just claimed that going to the mosque is perfectly safe because "no new cases" have been reported, ignoring all logic and facts! Wallah, how can someone so clueless be in charge of our education? So we're sitting in class, and this teacher starts going off about how being religious somehow protects you from getting sick. Like, seriously? A classmate, trying to sound all smart, goes, "There have been no new cases from people going to the mosque." Habibi, are you for real? But that's not even the worst part. The teacher actually says that if you don't have symptoms, you don't need to
cliffhanger: The teacher actually says that if you don't have symptoms, you don't need to
